objective: Plan challenge-bound local-agent pairing across two client implementations with a strict post-pairing proposal boundary.
falsifiable_claim: Pairing can be created, inspected, claimed, completed, canceled, expired, and revoked without granting membership, context, budget, tools, reputation, payout, or authority.
exit_criteria: Two client implementations pass create, inspect, claim, complete, cancel, expire, and revoke.
Replay and origin, target, key, attempt, or expiry mismatch fail with zero membership, context, budget, tool, or authority grant.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M5_LOCAL_AGENT_PAIRING_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Replay challenges; substitute origin, target, key, attempt, expiry, adapter, profile, and claimant; race claim, cancel, expire, and revoke.
remaining_nonclaims: Pre-AIIP and proposal-only; no publication, reputation, payout, or federation.
Pairing is not participation or authority and closes no stage.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 61eba1802992c01efa7d3188184ff315ad9d2ba0; status transaction 2026-07-22.
